channel.title: Technologic on Joe Hutchinson
channel.description: Recent content in Technologic on Joe Hutchinson

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi. I’m Joe Hutchinson and this is my blog. I believe AI will be the most disruptive technology the world has ever seen. I’m both excited and terrified of the possibilities it presents. To be a part of this revolution, and help ensure we do it safely and ethically, I’m working on a master’s at NC State focusing on robotics and artificial intelligence. In my free time I enjoy watching sci-fi films, exploring the outdoors, and spending time with friends.

item.title: Aether: A Clean Theme for Hugo
item.description: Today’s web is a frustrating mess of pop-ups, intrusive banners, and ads obstructing the content. I designed aether to be free of all these distractions and simply highlight the content. The result feels more like a native application than a website. Interactions are intuitive, content is the focus, and distractions are omitted. Aether is a Hugo theme for blogs that elevates good writing and photography. If you use Hugo for your blog, give aether a try.
